candidates.why: Classic SG&A personnel expense; part of operating overhead and not COGS or D&A.
Overhead operating expenses bucket excluding depreciation/impairments; fits SG&A. There are two identically named rows; the one with numeric values (15028–18891) is the substantive SG&A component.
Operating income, not expense; should not be included as SG&A cost.
Share-based compensation is typically part of SG&A personnel/overhead costs.
Net line mixing income and expenses; less ideal than pure expense buckets for SG&A.
Balance sheet item (assets), not a P&L expense.
Accumulated depreciation on assets; not SG&A expense line in the period.
Net asset value, not SG&A expense.
Accumulated depreciation; not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Selected multiple overhead components as SG&A: personnel costs, the main ‘Other operating expenses’ bucket (excluding totals/balancing rows), and share-based payments as part of personnel/overhead. Excluded income or balance-sheet lines.

variables.notes: XINT is modeled as a priority list: main ‘Interest Expenses’ first, then its components and supplemental labels as fallbacks. Balance sheet interest-bearing liabilities and non-controlling interest lines are excluded as they are not P&L interest expense.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of net income, not the equity balance itself.
Gain/loss line, not equity balance.

Total equity including non-controlling interests; would cause double-counting with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA

variables.notes: Used parent-only equity ‘Equity attributable to equity holders of Telenor ASA’ to avoid double-counting non-controlling interests in BE+MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement share of profit for non-controlling interests, not the balance sheet amount; use balance sheet lines for MIB instead.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to balance sheet non-controlling interest lines, using both label variants as a priority list to capture possible naming changes.
